'''Aar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="PSc4" /> in the [[Aar system/Legends|Aar system]]<ref name="TEA" /> of the [[Nijune sector/Legends|Nijune sector]],<ref name="TEAOC" /> part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to the [[Aar'aa]] [[Species/Legends|species]], [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] often employed as enforcers by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], a species known for its many [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]].<ref name="PSc4" />

==Behind the scenes==
Aar was first mentioned in the [[1997]] novel ''[[The Paradise Snare]]'', written by [[A. C. Crispin]].<ref name="PSc4" /> The [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] placed the Aar [[Star system/Legends|system]] in grid square N-5.<ref name="TEAOC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[The Paradise Snare (abridged audiobook)|''The Paradise Snare'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
